name: mindxo
description: AI governance and guardrails by MindXO — runtime risk classification, proportional controls, and audit logging for AI agents

plugins.name: gouvernai
plugins.description: Runtime guardrails for Claude Code with dual enforcement. Linguistic skill (risk classification, approval gates) + deterministic hooks (hard blocking of obfuscated commands, credential exfiltration, catastrophic operations). 67 unit tests.

plugins.name: gouvernai-skill
plugins.description: Runtime guardrails skill for Claude Code. Classifies every sensitive action by risk tier, enforces proportional controls (notify / approve / halt), and logs a full audit trail. Pure linguistic enforcement — zero dependencies, no hooks. Works everywhere Claude Code runs.
